description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a matte black exterior and rounded edges, giving it a modern and minimalistic appearance. The front face features a single, prominent circular control knob in a contrasting light color, likely used to adjust toasting settings. The top surface has two parallel, elongated slots for inserting bread slices, with metallic interiors visible through the openings. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the streamlined design. No visible branding, crumb tray, or power cord is apparent from any angle. The overall build suggests a sturdy appliance suitable for countertop use in kitchens or break areas.
description: A sleek, black rectangular toaster with two top slots and a single round control knob on the front. Its minimalist design features smooth surfaces and no visible branding or power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main body and a single round control knob on the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the toaster and the control knob protruding from the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, featureless surface and no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the toaster's smooth side without any controls.
attribute_control_knobs: One round, white control knob located on the lower right of the front face, no visible markings or labels.
attribute_toast_slots: Two parallel, rectangular toast slots on the top surface, evenly spaced and sized for standard bread slices.
